title: BLACKSWAP - AI Student Marketplace
description: An AI-powered marketplace exclusively for students to buy, sell, and exchange products securely. Features AI trade suggestions, real-time chat, OTP authentication, image uploads, ratings, location-based matching, and a modern responsive interface.

title: Campus Interview Tracker
description: A complete placement management platform for colleges with role-based authentication, company management, student dashboard, interview scheduling, attendance tracking, candidate progress, reports, and placement analytics.

title: MarketMind - AI Trading Platform
description: An AI-powered trading and market analysis platform providing stock insights, market trends, interactive dashboards, and intelligent investment recommendations through a clean modern interface.

title: Student Expense Calculator
description: A Spring Boot application that helps students manage daily expenses, visualize spending patterns, and generate financial reports with secure authentication and CRUD operations.

title: Airbnb Clone
description: A modern accommodation booking platform with property listings, authentication, booking features, search, filters, responsive design, and secure user management built using the MERN stack.

title: 3D Developer Portfolio
description: A premium interactive portfolio featuring 3D animations, galaxy effects, Framer Motion, Three.js, project showcases, certifications, achievements, and responsive UI/UX design.
